output.code:
# Read the file raw bytes and decode as utf-8, also print repr and content length
path = "/mnt/data/file-PsXCDHRk6Y5WDoEds8AVcG-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw = raw_bytes.decode("utf-8")
len_raw = len(raw)
raw[:1000]

raw = raw  # from previous cell
# Print the raw string fully and show indices around the quotes to determine exact spans
print(repr(raw[:4000]))

spans = []
# candidate texts as they appear in the file
aya1 = "إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ"
aya2 = "إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ"
hadith_candidate = "إن الشيطان لا يسلِّط على أحدكم فيفتنه في دينه، ولكن يسلِّط بما يسلِّط على أحدكم، فيفتنه في دينه، فيسلِّط عليه في نفسه، فيفتنه في دينه، فيسلِّط عليه في ماله، فيفتنه في دينه، فيسلِّط عليه في ولده، فيفتنه في دينه، فيسلِّط عليه في أهله، فيفتنه في دينه"
# print find
for text, label in [(aya1,"Aya"), (aya2,"Aya"), (hadith_candidate,"Hadeeth")]:
    idx = raw.find(text)
    print(label, "found?", idx)

# find opening quote before or at index 399, i.e., find the nearest double quote to the left
pos = raw.rfind('"', 0, 450)
pos, raw[pos-40:pos+40]

end_quote = raw.find('"', 399)  # find closing quote after the opening one
end_quote

# find quotes around aya1 and aya2
start_aya1 = raw.find(aya1)
print("aya1 start", start_aya1, "char before:", raw[start_aya1-5:start_aya1+5])
# find opening quote before aya1
open_q1 = raw.rfind('"', 0, start_aya1)
open_q1, raw[open_q1-30:open_q1+2]

start_aya2 = raw.find(aya2)
open_q2 = raw.rfind('"', 0, start_aya2)
start_aya2, open_q2, raw[open_q2-30:open_q2+5]

# verify spans
spans_to_check = [(111,198), (249,335), (399, len_raw)]
for s,e in spans_to_check:
    print(s,e)
    print(raw[s:e]==raw[s:e])  # trivial check
    print("excerpt:", repr(raw[s:e][:80]) + ("..." if e-s>80 else ""))
    print()
